title: Moana
description: An adventurous teenager sails out on a daring mission to save her people, and along the way discovers the one thing she always sought: her own identity.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
description: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his reality and crosses paths with five counterparts from other dimensions to stop a threat to all realities.

title: The Princess Bride
description: A young woman named Buttercup is kidnapped, and her childhood sweetheart Westley must rescue her, facing giants, swordsmen, and a scheming prince along the way.
